policy: CSS cascade debt ratchet. Counts may stay at or below these limits; lower a limit only after cleanup lands, and raise it only with an explicit product/design reason.

important.description: Locks the current !important count so cascade exceptions do not grow silently.

transitionAll.description: Locks transition: all usage; new transitions should name concrete properties.

zIndex.description: Locks stacking-context pressure until z-index layers are tokenized.

boxShadow.description: Locks one-off shadow count until shadows move to shared tokens.
